title: Read the plan before tuning a query
description: Diagnose slow queries with EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) on real data before adding indexes or rewriting SQL.
body: Use when a query is slow or before optimizing one. Do not add indexes by guessing column names or rewrite SQL without a plan. Actions: run EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) on representative data; compare estimated vs actual rows to spot bad statistics; identify the costly node (seq scan, nested loop on large input, sort spilling to disk); check whether buffers show heavy heap reads. Validation signals include the plan switching from a sequential scan to an index/index-only scan and actual time dropping. Risk boundary: tuning from row counts alone or on tiny dev data misleads; if the plan differs from production stats, escalate to test against production-like data.
